properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: One more mother with a broken heart One more family is torn apart One more orphan out in the cold One more fear that takes control One more tangled in the same old lies One more shackled to the same old highs One more scared of what tomorrow brings And one more chasing yesterday

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Lord, let Your kingdom come Who can right every wrong You are the only One Who can calm every storm You are the only One You alone are Father, Savior, Spirit, Healer, Redeemer Lord of all You are the only One

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: One more skeptic to believe One more prisoner has been set free One more longs to be Your hands and feet One more standing for the least of these One more praying in the morning light One more shining in the darkest night One more life worth fighting for No greater love worth dying for

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Lord, let Your kingdom come Lord, let Your will be done

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Who can right every wrong You are the only One Who can calm every storm You are the only One You alone are Father, Savior, Spirit, Healer, Redeemer Lord of all You are the only One You are the only One

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: I want to know You more I want to make You known I want this world to see That You're alive in me Jesus, You're the only One

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Who can right every wrong You are the only One Who can calm every storm You are the only One You alone are Father, Savior, Spirit, Healer, Redeemer Lord of all You are the only One (Father, Savior, Spirit) You are the only One (Redeemer, Lord of all) You are the only One
